title: Apohara ContextForge: KV-cache coordination for multi-agent LLM pipelines on AMD MI300X

creators.name: Suarez, Pablo M.
creators.affiliation: Universidad Nacional de Tucumán, Facultad de Ciencias Naturales

description: Apohara ContextForge V7.0.0-rc.1: real KV-cache reuse end-to-end. Hardware-validated on AMD Instinct MI300X (192 GB, ROCm 7.2.0). See AUDIT.md for honest measurement protocol and paper v2.0 at paper/inv15_paper.pdf.
